text.title: shadcn/ui Architecture Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the project using React + Tailwind + vendored shadcn primitives?

conclusion.verdict: skip; use the chosen design-system methodology

branch.question: Do `components/ui/*` files import from features or business APIs?

conclusion.verdict: extract feature wrappers; primitives stay generic
wire CODEOWNERS + lint on primitive dir

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
